name: Introducing Human-Centeredness in AI-Assisted Lexicography

description: arXiv:2607.11808v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: This paper proposes a human-centered artificial intelligence (HCAI) framework for AI-assisted lexicography. While generative AI offers significant opportunities to enhance lexicographic work, it also raises concerns regarding the future role of lexicographers and the preservation of linguistic and cultural diversity. author: Antonio San Martin, Catherine Trekker
